mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `draft` (author_id, title, content, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{authorId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{status}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, author_id, title, content, status, created_at, updated_at FROM `draft` WHERE author_id = #{authorId} ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC
